decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Drift corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, scheduled 2026-06-15 12:00 UTC) was still stale SCHEDULED in shorts_state.json but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200, controls 5e8ELVo5ARg + _TGvU9o7i4Q also 200). It auto-published on schedule 5 days ago; YouTube does not write back to the state file. Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. Studio cross-check via mcp_stealth.py was UNAVAILABLE this run — mcphub aggregator returning HTTP 530 (origin down) on initialize, twice. Fell back to oEmbed, the documented session-safe probe. State file now has 0 SCHEDULED, 11/11 PUBLIC.

Not a publish day (Sat 06-20). Next 3 days: Sun 06-21 (weekly long-form cadence slot, 17:00 UTC) — EMPTY; Mon 06-22 (v4 Roanoke long-form ship day + v4_hook Short 12:00 per runs/v4-roanoke/SHORTS_PLAN.md) — NOTHING RENDERED OR SCHEDULED; Tue 06-23 — empty. Pipeline fully dry beyond 06-15. v4 Roanoke production is STALLED at script stage (script.json + SHORTS_PLAN done; voice/assets/render/thumb/Shorts all pending) blocked on the 2026-06-13 Google Flow Nano Banana 2 thumb blocker (submit button disabled, suspected free-tier/anti-abuse/UI redesign). With ship target 06-22 only 2 days out and ~4-6h of focused work + a hard Flow blocker remaining, v4 will MISS its slot unless production resumes now (resolve Flow in a fresh session or use the v3 Tunguska AI base as placeholder thumb per the 06-13 backup plan). Reddit r/UnresolvedMysteries seed NOT drafted today (step 4 triggers only on a long-form publish day; today is not one).
